heading.title: Prompts
heading.templatesSubtitle: Start from a ready-made prompt. Pick a template, customize the name, and it's added to your library instantly.

help.intro: Prompts are reusable instruction templates shared across servers — write one once, then link it wherever an AI client should be able to pull it.
help.step1: Create a prompt here, or start from a curated Prompt Template.
help.step2: Write the content using {{open}}argumentName{{close}} placeholders for anything the caller should fill in — Arthur detects these automatically and exposes them as arguments.
help.step3: Open a server's Prompts tab and link the prompt from the shared library.
help.step4: Enable the linked prompt so AI clients and the public documentation page can see it.
help.success: The prompt appears (enabled) on the server's Prompts tab, and a connected AI client can fetch it with its detected arguments.
help.oneManyServers: One prompt, many servers: editing the shared prompt updates it everywhere it's linked — you're not maintaining duplicate copies.
help.disableHint: Disabling a linked prompt on one server doesn't remove it from the shared library or from any other server it's linked to.

create.title: New prompt
create.detailsHint: Give the prompt a clear name and optional tags so it is easy to find later.
create.reviewHint: Confirm the prompt before adding it to your shared library.

placeholder.addTag: Add tag and press Enter or ","

hint.renameHint: You can rename it later from the Prompts page
hint.editAfterCreate: You can edit the full content after creation from the Prompts page.

empty.noPrompts: No prompts yet. Click New prompt to create your first one.
empty.noVariables: No variables detected. Use {{open}}variable_name{{close}} in the Editor tab.
empty.notReferenced: This prompt is not referenced by any server yet.

confirm.deleteMessage: This prompt will be permanently removed.

error.loadTemplateCatalog: The prompt template catalog could not be loaded.
error.loadTemplateDetail: This prompt template could not be opened. Please try again.
